title: Valentine's concert: romance and music in a garden
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - A magical evening of music and romance awaits this Valentine’s Day, Friday 14 February, featuring the singer Adam du Plessis and the Carpe Musicam! Pops Band, at the Garden Route Botanical Garden.


> The concert starts at 18:30 and food stalls open at 17:30. Ticket prices cost R40 (learners 6 - 17), R80 (single adult) and R150 (couples).


Tickets are available at the Garden Route Botanical Garden's reception office at 49 Caledon Street, Camphersdrift.

Tickets will also be sold at the Aloe Entrance Gate, from 17:30, on Friday 14 February.

The concert will take place at the Gazebo inside the Garden. Parking is available inside, near the Gazebo, accessed via the Aloe Entrance Gate.

Adam du Plessis

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
